Once upon a time, there was a little bunny named Spot. Spot was very hungry. He wanted to find food to eat. He looked and looked, but he could not find any food. Spot felt sad for the little bunny, so he started to feel bad.
Spot went to the kitchen and found a big box. He opened the box and found a yummy cake. Spot was so happy! He ate the cake and shared it with his friend, a little bird named Chirpy.
Bear came back with a yummy treat. They ate the yummy cake and became friends. Spot learned that everyone can help each other. And they all lived happily ever after.
